creator: xelalex_maker@web.de
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #7)

It's there on my system, but is not found, obviously:

$ geogebra
/usr/local/share/geogebra/jre1.7.0_45-i686/bin/java: error while loading shared libraries: libjli.so: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory

$ ls -l /usr/local/share/geogebra/jre1.7.0_45-i686/lib/i386/jli/libjli.so 
-r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  88513 22 Mär 11:14 /usr/local/share/geogebra/jre1.7.0_45-i686/lib/i386/jli/libjli.so
